journey.name: Multi-Page Canvas Navigation
journey.description: Verifies adding pages, drawing different strokes on each page, switching between pages to verify retention, and syncing the multi-page notebook.

actions.action: Inject stylus stroke on Page 1 from (100, 100) to (200, 200)
Verify that canvas active page is "Page 1" and stroke count is 1
Tap "Add Page" button in the page switcher toolbar
Verify that canvas active page is "Page 2" and stroke count is 0
Inject stylus stroke on Page 2 from (150, 150) to (300, 300)
Verify that canvas active page is "Page 2" and stroke count is 1
Tap "Previous Page" button in the page switcher toolbar
Verify that canvas active page is "Page 1" and stroke count is 1
Verify that canvas active page is "Page 2" and stroke count is 1
Verify that sync state changes to "Sync Successful" for both Page 1 and Page 2
